channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sanders bill would allow government seizure of AI company stock
Obama Center embeds Indigenous land acknowledgment on controversial site
item.description: A permanent land acknowledgment display at the Obama Presidential Center has sparked debate given the site's history.

item.title: Lawmaker who sued over Trump's Kennedy Center name now calls venue a 'lifeless husk'
item.description: Democratic Rep. Joyce Beatty, who sued to remove Trump's name, says the Kennedy Center is violating an agreement by not resuming shows.

item.title: Trump calls Iran deal surrender, predicts regime change
item.description: President Trump defended his administration's Iran agreement, calling it an unconditional surrender by Tehran and predicting regime change.
